meaning: n.(对习俗或法律上不应取酬的服务的)酬劳(或答谢)
examples: A group of residents agreed to conduct the survey for a small honorarium.
It was probably the highest honorarium ever received by an author for writing a book.
Since the honorarium they had offered was three hundred and fifty dollars, Martin thought it not worth while to telegraph.
As you understand that we are a faith-based organization, though we have a sponsor we are still prudent with funds, we will like to offer a 15, 000 USD honorarium fee, is this acceptable.
